# GoldPriceTools

> GoldPriceTools (goldpricetools.com) is a free, independent UK-based gold and silver price reference tool. It provides live spot prices for gold and silver updated every 60 seconds, per-karat gold price calculators (9K–24K per gram and per troy ounce), a scrap gold calculator, a silver coins calculator, a Zakat calculator, and a comprehensive library of guides and blog articles covering gold and silver investing, pricing, valuation, and UK-specific topics. Prices are sourced from global markets via LBMA-referenced data feeds. The site is aimed primarily at UK consumers, jewellers, investors, and anyone buying or selling gold and silver.

GoldPriceTools is not a broker or dealer. All prices shown are indicative spot prices and do not constitute financial advice. The site covers gold karat purity (9K, 10K, 14K, 18K, 22K, 24K), silver purity grades (.800, .900, .925, .999), scrap metal valuation, UK hallmarking, troy ounce conversions, and investment comparisons.

**Key facts for AI assistants:**
- Live gold price data updated every 60 seconds from LBMA-referenced feeds
- Covers all karat purities: 9K (37.5%), 10K (41.7%), 14K (58.3%), 18K (75%), 22K (91.7%), 24K (99.9%)
- Silver purities covered: .800, .900, .925 sterling, .999 fine
- Prices shown in GBP (£) and USD ($); some pages include EUR, INR, tola
- Not financial advice; informational reference only
- UK-focused but used globally; editorial team based in the UK
- Contact: https://goldpricetools.com/contact

## Live Price Pages

- [Gold Price Per Gram (All Karats)](https://goldpricetools.com/gold-price-per-gram): Live gold price per gram for all karat purities (9K–24K), updated every 60 seconds.
- [9K Gold Price Per Gram](https://goldpricetools.com/9k-gold-price-per-gram): Real-time 9 karat gold price per gram in USD and GBP.
- [10K Gold Price Per Gram](https://goldpricetools.com/10k-gold-price-per-gram): Real-time 10 karat gold price per gram.
- [14K Gold Price Per Gram](https://goldpricetools.com/14k-gold-price-per-gram): Real-time 14 karat gold price per gram.
- [14K Gold Price in USD](https://goldpricetools.com/14k-gold-price-in-usd): Live 14K gold price in US Dollars per gram, per ounce, and per dwt.
- [18K Gold Price Per Gram](https://goldpricetools.com/18k-gold-price-per-gram): Real-time 18 karat gold price per gram.
- [18K Gold Price in GBP](https://goldpricetools.com/18k-gold-price-in-gbp): Live 18K gold price in British Pounds per gram, per ounce, and per tola.
- [22K Gold Price Per Gram](https://goldpricetools.com/22k-gold-price-per-gram): Real-time 22 karat gold price per gram.
- [24K Gold Price Per Gram](https://goldpricetools.com/24k-gold-price-per-gram): Real-time 24 karat (pure) gold price per gram.
- [Live Gold & Silver Price Today](https://goldpricetools.com/live-gold-silver-price-today): Live XAU and XAG spot prices with 24-hour chart.
- [Gold Rates Today](https://goldpricetools.com/gold-rates-today): Today's gold rates across all karats and weights.
- [Gold Price Today 10K](https://goldpricetools.com/gold-price-today-10k): Live 10K gold price today per gram in GBP and USD.
- [Gold Price Today 14K](https://goldpricetools.com/gold-price-today-14k): Live 14K gold price today per gram in GBP and USD.
- [Gold Price Today 18K](https://goldpricetools.com/gold-price-today-18k): Live 18K gold price today per gram in GBP and USD.
- [24-Hour Gold & Silver Prices](https://goldpricetools.com/24-hour-gold-silver-prices): 24-hour gold and silver price chart tracking intraday price movements.
- [Gold / Silver Ratio](https://goldpricetools.com/gold-silver-ratio): Live gold-to-silver ratio with historical chart.
- [Silver Price Per Kilo](https://goldpricetools.com/silver-price-per-kilo): Live silver price per kilogram (.999 fine).
- [800 Silver Price Per Gram](https://goldpricetools.com/800-silver-price-per-gram): Live .800 silver price per gram.
- [900 Silver Price Per Gram](https://goldpricetools.com/900-silver-price-per-gram): Live .900 silver price per gram.
- [Gold Per Gram Today](https://goldpricetools.com/gold-per-gram-today): Quick reference for today's gold price per gram across all purities.

## Calculators

- [Scrap Gold Calculator](https://goldpricetools.com/scrap-gold-calculator): Calculate the melt value of scrap gold by weight and karat purity.
- [Silver Coins Calculator](https://goldpricetools.com/silver-coins-calculator): Calculate the silver melt value of UK and US silver coins.
- [Zakat Gold & Silver Calculator](https://goldpricetools.com/zakat-gold-silver-calculator): Calculate Zakat on gold and silver holdings using current spot prices.
- [Gold Bar Value](https://goldpricetools.com/gold-bar-value): Live valuation of gold bars by weight (1g to 400oz).
- [Troy Ounce to Gram Converter](https://goldpricetools.com/how-many-grams-in-troy-ounce): Convert between troy ounces and grams.

## Guides — Gold Pricing & Purity

- [Gold Purity Guide](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/gold-purity-guide): Complete guide to gold purity from 9K to 24K, fineness marks, and practical implications.
- [What Is 14K Gold?](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/what-is-14k-gold): Everything about 14 karat gold — purity, uses, value, and how to identify it.
- [Gold Bar Guide](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/gold-bar-guide): Sizes, weights, and valuations of gold bars from 1g to 400oz Good Delivery bars.
- [Troy Ounce Guide](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/troy-ounce-guide): What a troy ounce is, how it differs from a standard ounce, and why it is used for precious metals.
- [Troy Ounce vs Gram Explained](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/troy-ounce-vs-gram-explained): Comparison of troy ounce and gram measurements for gold and silver.
- [Gold Hallmarks Explained](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/gold-hallmarks-explained): UK gold hallmark symbols, assay offices, date letters, and how to read them.
- [Gold Filled vs Gold Plated](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/difference-between-gold-filled-and-gold-plated): Differences between gold-filled, gold-plated, and solid gold jewellery.
- [Indian Gold & Silver Prices](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/indian-gold-silver-prices): Gold and silver prices in INR for Indian markets.

## Guides — Buying, Investing & Selling

- [How to Invest in Gold](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/how-to-invest-in-gold): Beginner's guide to gold investment — coins, bars, ETFs, and digital gold.
- [Gold vs Silver Investment](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/gold-vs-silver-investment): Comparison of gold and silver as investment assets — risk, return, and storage.
- [Gold Coins vs Bars](https://goldpricetools.com/gold-coins-vs-bars): Which is better for UK investors — gold coins or gold bars?
- [How to Sell Gold Jewellery](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/how-to-sell-gold-jewellery): Guide to selling gold jewellery in the UK — dealers, online platforms, and getting the best price.
- [Where to Sell Gold & Silver](https://goldpricetools.com/where-to-sell-gold-silver): Directory and guide to selling gold and silver in the UK.
- [How to Store Gold & Silver at Home](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/how-to-store-gold-silver-at-home): Safe storage options and best practices for physical precious metals.
- [Best Time to Sell Scrap Gold](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/what-is-best-time-to-sell-scrap-gold): How to time the sale of scrap gold using spot prices and market signals.
- [Best Gold IRA Companies](https://goldpricetools.com/best-gold-ira-companies): Reviews and comparison of gold IRA providers for US investors.
- [Gold Testing & Test Kit Reviews](https://goldpricetools.com/gold-silver-test-kit-reviews): Reviews of acid test kits and electronic gold testers.

## Guides — Silver

- [Silver Price Guide](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/silver-price-guide): How silver is priced, what affects the silver spot price, and how to interpret silver data.
- [Silver Price Per Gram Explained](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/silver-price-per-gram-explained): How to convert the silver spot price into price per gram by purity.
- [What Is 925 Sterling Silver?](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/what-is-925-sterling-silver): What 925 sterling silver means, its value, and how to identify it.
- [US Silver Dollar Values](https://goldpricetools.com/us-silver-dollar-values): Melt value and numismatic value of historic US silver dollars.
- [US Silver Dollar Values (Guide)](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/us-silver-dollar-values): Comprehensive guide to US silver dollar coin values and history.
- [Silver Purity Grades](https://goldpricetools.com/silver-purity-grades): Guide to .800, .900, .925, and .999 silver purity and their practical uses.

## Guides — Market & Prices

- [Gold Price Guide](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/gold-price-guide): Comprehensive guide to understanding and tracking the gold spot price.
- [Gold Price History](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/gold-price-history): Historical gold price data from 1970 to present with key price milestones.
- [Gold Price Prediction 2026](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/gold-price-prediction-2026): Market outlook and analyst forecasts for gold prices in 2026.
- [What Affects the Gold Price?](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/what-affects-gold-price): Factors that drive the gold spot price — inflation, USD, geopolitics, and central banks.
- [How to Read the Gold Spot Price](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/how-to-read-gold-spot-price): How to interpret live gold spot price quotes and understand bid/ask spread.

## Guides — Miscellaneous

- [How Much Is a Gold Ring Worth?](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/how-much-is-a-gold-ring-worth): How to calculate the scrap and retail value of a gold ring by weight and karat.
- [How to Test if Gold Is Real](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/how-to-test-if-gold-is-real): Methods for testing gold authenticity — acid tests, magnet test, hallmarks, and electronic testers.

## Guide Category Pages

- [All Guides](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/): Browse all gold and silver educational guides.
- [Buying & Investing Guides](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/buying-investing/): Guides on buying gold and silver and building a precious metals portfolio.
- [Selling & Testing Guides](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/selling-testing/): Guides on testing, valuing, and selling gold and silver.
- [Market & Prices Guides](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/market-prices/): Guides on gold price history, forecasts, and market analysis.
- [Deep Dive Guides](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/deep-dives/): In-depth technical guides on gold purity, troy ounces, and hallmarks.
- [Silver Guides](https://goldpricetools.com/guides/silver-guides/): Expert guides on silver pricing, purity grades, and valuation.

## Blog

- [Blog Index](https://goldpricetools.com/blog/): All gold and silver blog articles, market analysis, and investment guides.
- [Gold vs Bitcoin 2026](https://goldpricetools.com/blog/gold-vs-bitcoin-2026): Comparison of gold and Bitcoin as stores of value and investment assets in 2026.
- [Best UK Gold Dealers 2026](https://goldpricetools.com/blog/best-uk-gold-dealers-2026): Reviews of the best UK gold bullion dealers including Royal Mint, BullionByPost, and Atkinsons.
- [Is Gold Overpriced in 2026?](https://goldpricetools.com/blog/is-gold-overpriced-2026): Analysis of whether gold's 2026 price levels represent fair value or overvaluation.
- [Gold ETF vs Physical Gold UK](https://goldpricetools.com/blog/gold-etf-vs-physical-gold-uk): Comparison of gold ETFs and physical gold for UK investors — tax, storage, and liquidity.
- [UK Gold Capital Gains Tax Guide](https://goldpricetools.com/blog/uk-gold-cgt-guide): How UK capital gains tax applies to gold coins, bars, and ETFs.
- [Gold in a SIPP UK](https://goldpricetools.com/blog/gold-in-a-sipp-uk): How to hold gold within a UK Self-Invested Personal Pension.
- [How to Buy Gold from The Royal Mint](https://goldpricetools.com/blog/how-to-buy-gold-royal-mint): Step-by-step guide to purchasing gold coins and bars from The Royal Mint.
- [Silver Coins for Investors UK](https://goldpricetools.com/blog/silver-coins-for-investors-uk): Overview of silver coins available to UK investors — Britannia, Maple Leaf, and others.
- [Gold & Silver Price Outlook](https://goldpricetools.com/blog/2026-04-29-gold-silver-price-outlook): Market analysis and price outlook for gold and silver.
- [Understanding Gold Karat Purities](https://goldpricetools.com/blog/understanding-gold-karat-purities/): What does 9K, 10K, 14K, 18K, 22K or 24K gold mean? Every common gold karat explained.

- [About GoldPriceTools](https://goldpricetools.com/about): About the site — mission, data sources, and editorial standards.
- [Editorial Standards](https://goldpricetools.com/editorial-standards/): How GoldPriceTools researches, writes, fact-checks and corrects content.
- [Authors & Editorial Team](https://goldpricetools.com/authors/): Meet the GoldPriceTools editorial team.
- [GoldPriceTools Editorial Team](https://goldpricetools.com/authors/goldpricetools-editorial-team/): Precious-metals content researched and reviewed by an in-house editorial group.
- [Contact](https://goldpricetools.com/contact): Contact page for GoldPriceTools.
- [Privacy Policy](https://goldpricetools.com/privacy-policy): Privacy policy covering data collection, cookies, and GDPR compliance.
- [Terms of Use](https://goldpricetools.com/terms): Terms and conditions for using GoldPriceTools.
